titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the School of Medicine, Yale University, Student Examinations
School of Medicine, Yale University, Student Examinations
titlestmt.author: compiled by staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 13, 2020 at 11:50

did.unittitle: School of Medicine, Yale University, student examinations
did.abstract: The records consist of annual examinations and matriculation examinations written by students enrolled in the Yale School of Medicine.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 27-F (YRG 27-F), Student records of the Yale School of Medicine.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: School of Medicine, Yale University, Student Examinations (RU 456). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by accession.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Elliott Dunlap Smith: B.A. Harvard 1913, LL.B., 1916; Professor Industrial Engineering, Yale, 1928-1932, Professor Industrial Relations, 1932-1938, Professor Economics, 1938-1946, asst. to the President, 1942-1943.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of annual examinations and matriculation examinations written by students enrolled in the Yale School of Medicine.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: exams after 1882 either lack names or coherent order

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of examinations by Loren T. Day, Yale M.D. 1880. Originals are housed at the University of Kansas Medical Center, Department of History and Philosophy of Medicine.
